## Adeptus Mechanicus

![][image1]

### Adeptus Mechanicus Special Rules

**Canticles of the Omnissiah.** At the start of each Turn, choose one of the following Canticles. That Canticle applies until the start of the next Turn. You cannot choose the same Canticle twice in a row. Alternatively, you can choose a Canticle randomly, in which case it can be the same Canticle as the previous one.

1. **Benediction of the Omnissiah.** Your MECHANICUS models can reroll one die during each Success Roll they take to Hit with a ranged attack.  
2. **Chant of the Remorseless Fist.** When one of your MECHANICUS models hits an enemy in melee, you can reroll one INJURY DIE.  
3. **Invocation of Machine Vengeance.** Your MECHANICUS models have \+1 DICE when taking the Dash Success Roll.  
4. **Incantation of the Iron Soul.** You gain \+1 DICE to Morale Tests made for your Warband.  
5. **Litany of the Electromancer.** Your MECHANICUS models have BLOCK.  
6. **Shroudpsalm.** Your MECHANICUS models have STEALTH. Any model that already has STEALTH replaces the effects of that keyword with: Enemies have \-1 DICE to hit this model with ranged attacks.

**The Search For Archeotech.** During a campaign, at the start of each battle, before deployment, your opponent places a 1” Archeotech marker anywhere on the battlefield that is not within a deployment zone, within 6” of a battlefield edge, or on Impassable Terrain or completely surrounded by it

As an Action with a Success Roll, any of your models in contact with the marker can attempt to recover that marker. On a success, it is carrying that marker. It can pass the marker to any ally it is within 1” of at the end of any of its Activations. If it is taken Out of Action, a model carrying an Archeotech marker drops it at their previous position.

At the end of the battle, if one of your models is carrying an Archeotech marker, you have recovered a piece of Archeotech. Add it to your reserves. Roll a D6 to determine its type:

* 1-3. Power Source  
* 4\. Weapon Part  
* 5\. Force Field Part  
* 6\. Techno-Arcana

Then roll a D6 to determine its precise nature:

| Roll | Power Source | Weapon Part | Force Field Part | Techno-Arcana |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 1 | Restrained Vortex | Electro-Fire Implements | Void Shell | Obscuroptikon |
| 2 | Spatial Alternator | Neural Jammer | Arc Implants | Exo-Gauntlet |
| 3 | Teleportation Matrix | Nanoshard Projector | Time Sink | Ferrosanctic Orrery |
| 4 | Acidic Conductor | Arc Annulus | Conversion Eradicator | Hagioscope |
| 5 | Endothermic Reactor | Electro-Fused Vambraces | Inverse Power Feeds | Tri-Dimensional Covenant |
| 6 | Induction Node | Digital Cannon | Technodermis | Hypercircuit |

*Reconstructing Archeotech*  
By combining a Power Source with a Weapon Part, Force Field Part, or Techno-Arcana, you can create a piece of functioning Archeotech battlekit. The effect of this piece of battlekit is determined by the Weapon Part, Force Field Part, or Techno-Arcana, with an additional modification based on the Power Source.

Any of your non-Mercenary MECHANICUS models can be equipped with Archeotech. A model can be equipped with only up to 1 Archeotech Weapon, 1 Archeotech Force Field, and 1 Archeotech Techno-Arcana.

You can sell functioning pieces of Archeotech battlekit for 1 Glory apiece.

*Archeotech Weapons*

* **Electro-Fire Implements.** 12”, \+1 DICE, \-1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT, FIRE, takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle.  
* **Neural Jammer.** 18”, \-1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL, STUN, takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle. Cannot be used against an ARTIFICIAL target.  
* **Nanoshard Projector.** 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, PISTOL, takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle.  
* **Arc Annulus.** 18”, if the target would have an armour modifier from any source other than a shield, you may set one die of the injury roll to a 6 before the roll is made. The rest of the dice for the injury roll are rolled as normal. Takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle.  
* **Electro-Fused Vambraces.** 18” (always uses ranged skill), ASSAULT, STUN, PISTOL, takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle.  
* **Digital Cannon.** 24”, \+1 INJURY DICE, takes no hands, but can be used only once per battle.

*Weapon Power Sources*

* **Restrained Vortex.** The weapon gains BLAST 3”. The wielder is never hit due to this Keyword.  
* **Spatial Alternator.** On a hit, the target must also move D3” in the direction of your choice, including falling, free attack from leaving melee, etc.  
* **Teleportation Matrix.** Immediately after a hit with the weapon, if the target is still on the battlefield, the wielder can teleport to anywhere within 1” of the target that is not within 1” of any other enemy.  
* **Acidic Conductor.** The weapon has VICIOUS 10\.  
* **Endothermic Reactor.** A target hit by the weapon has half movement during its next Activation.  
* **Induction Node.** A target hit by the weapon has \-1 DICE to hit with all attacks until the end of its next Activation.

*Archeotech Force Fields*

* **Void Shell.** Once per battle, the bearer can treat one Down Injury result as a Minor Hit instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Arc Implants.** When an enemy successfully Charges the bearer, that enemy gains 1 STUN MARKER.  
* **Time Sink.** Once per battle, as an Action that requires no roll, the bearer can choose one enemy it can see within 12” that has not activated this Turn. That enemy cannot activate until your opponent has activated D3 other models, or until there is no choice.  
* **Conversion Eradicator.** When the bearer is taken Out of Action, one enemy within 12” of it suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER.  
* **Inverse Power Feeds.** The bearer’s melee attacks score a Critical Hit on a roll of 11 or higher.  
* **Technodermis.** Once per battle, the bearer can apply \-1 DICE to one Injury roll made against it.

*Force Field Power Sources*

* **Restrained Vortex.** Any enemy that Charges the bearer has \-1 DICE to Hit it with melee attacks until the end of the Turn.  
* **Spatial Alternator.** The bearer has \+1” to its movement speed.  
* **Teleportation Matrix.** When the bearer takes the Dash Success Roll, it can ignore terrain and enemy models during that movement.  
* **Acidic Conductor.** Melee attacks against the bearer lose the ARMOUR PIERCING 1 Keyword. This does not affect ARMOUR PIERCING 2 or IGNORE ARMOUR.  
* **Endothermic Reactor.** When an enemy Charges the bearer, subtract 2” from its movement during that Charge.  
* **Induction Node.** Once per battle, the bearer can gain \+1 DICE to Hit with one attack it makes.

*Archeotech Techno-Arcanas*

* **Obscuroptikon.** While the Shroudpsalm Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.  
* **Exo-Gauntlet.** While the Chant of the Remorseless Fist Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.  
* **Ferrosanctic Orrery.** While the Incantation of the Iron Soul Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.  
* **Hagioscope.** While the Benediction of the Omnissiah Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.  
* **Tri-Dimensional Covenant.** While the Invocation of Machine Vengeance Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.  
* **Hypercircuit.** While the Litany of the Electromancer Canticle is active, this techn-arcana is also active.

*Techno-Arcana Power Sources*

* **Restrained Vortex.** While this techno-arcana is active, \+DICE cannot be added to Injuries caused by melee attacks against the bearer or any of its allies within 6”, except due to spending BLOOD MARKERS and INFECTION MARKERS.  
* **Spatial Alternator.** While this techno-arcana is active, enemies have \-1 DICE to hit the bearer and any of its allies within 6” of the bearer with ranged attacks.  
* **Teleportation Matrix.** While this techno-arcana is active, the bearer and any of its allies within 6” of it always Charge the full 12”, regardless of the roll or any penalties to Charge distance. Other effects such as Difficult Terrain still apply.  
* **Acidic Conductor.** While this techno-arcana is active, increase the range of all non-THROWN ranged weapons the bearer and any of its allies within 6” of it wield by 6”.  
* **Endothermic Reactor.** While this techno-arcana is active, enemy models never get free attacks against the bearer or any of its allies within 6” when they Retreat, and the the bearer and any of its allies within 6”  can move out of Melee Combat using their Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.  
* **Induction Node.** While this techno-arcana is active, the bearer and any of its allies within 6” of it have \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.

### Adeptus Mechanicus Patrons

Your patron can be a Fabricator Locum or a Skitarii Overlord.

#### Patron: Fabricator Locum

*Or a similar high-ranking member of the Adeptus Mechanicus.*

* **Emotionless Clarity.** This model and each friendly MECHANICUS model within 6” of it ignore the FEAR Keyword.  
* **Masterwork Bionics.** This model has \+1 DICE to all Climb, Dash, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls.  
* **First-Hand Field Testing.** The first attack this model makes with a ranged weapon during each of its Activations has ARMOUR PIERCING 1, stacking with all other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING.  
* **Necromechanic.** This model has \+1 DICE to use Actions that remove BLOOD MARKERS from friendly models, and whenever it would remove exactly 1 BLOOD MARKER with such an Action, it removes D3 instead.  
* **Cartogrammatist.** This model gains the Exploration Skill of your choice.  
* **Supervisory Radiance.** Friendly non-Elite MECHANICUS models within 3” of this model have \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.

#### Patron: Skitarii Overseer

*Or a similar high-ranking Skitarii officer.*

* **Archived Engagements.** All attacks have \-1 DICE to Hit this model.  
* **Battle-Sphere Uplink.** Select any skill you want from the Ranged Skills.  
* **Eyes Of The Omnissiah.** This model ignores all \-DICE to Hit with ranged attacks.  
* **Firepoint Telemetry Cache.** This model is always considered in Cover and gains the STLEATH Keyword.  
* **Multitasking Cortex.** This model may form a FIRETEAM with any one non-ELITE model of the Warband. In addition, the first time either model fails a Risky Success Roll during a Fireteam Activation, the Activation does not end.  
* **Programmed Retreat.** Enemy models never get free attacks against this model when it Retreats, and this model can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.

### Adeptus Mechanicus Unique Battlekit

#### Adeptus Mechanicus Ranged Weapons

* **Arc Lance.** 12”, ASSAULT, STUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Eradication Ray.** 24”, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, ARMOUR PIERCING 1 within 12”, TWO-HANDED  
* **Flechette Carbine.** 18”, \+1 DICE if shot from behind any terrain obstacles, ASSAULT, AUTOMATIC 2, \-1 INJURY DICE, SHRAPNEL, TWO-HANDED  
* **Galvanic Rifle.** 30”, STUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Phosphor Blaster.** 24”, IGNORE COVER, TWO-HANDED  
* **Phosphor Carbine.** 18”, IGNORE COVER, ASSAULT, TWO-HANDED  
* **Plasma Caliver.** 30”, TWO-HANDED  
  * Normal Shot: ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
  * Overload: \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, RISKY, roll on the injury table on a miss  
* **Radium Carbine.** 18”, ASSAULT, GAS, TWO-HANDED  
* **Transuranic Arquebus.** 36”, IGNORE ARMOUR, TWO-HANDED  
* **Volkite Blaster.** 24”, CRITICAL, FIRE, RISKY, TWO-HANDED

#### Adeptus Mechanicus Pistols

* **Eradication Pistol.** 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1 within 6”, PISTOL  
* **Flechette Blaster.** 12”, \-1 INJURY DICE, \+1 DICE if shot from behind any terrain obstacles, ASSAULT, SHRAPNEL, PISTOL  
* **Gamma Pistol.** 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, PISTOL  
* **Mechanicus Pistol.** 12”, CRITICAL, PISTOL  
* **Phosphor Pistol.** 12”, IGNORE COVER, PISTOL  
* **Phosphor Serpenta.** 18”, IGNORE COVER, PISTOL  
* **Twin Mechanicus Pistols.** 12”, \+1 DICE, CRITICAL, CUMBERSOME, TWO-HANDED, PISTOL

#### Adeptus Mechanicus Heavy Ranged Weapons

* **Magnarail Lance.** 36”, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Phosphor Cannon.** 36”, AUTOMATIC 2, IGNORE COVER, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Transonic Cannon.** 12”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED

#### Adeptus Mechanicus Melee Weapons

* **Arc Claw.** Melee, STUN  
* **Electroleech Stave.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, STUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Electrostatic Gauntlets.** HELD, comes as a pair of gauntlets.  
  * Strike: Melee, STUN. IGNORE OFF-HAND.  
  * Bolt: 12”, STUN. The gauntlets can each be used to make a ranged attack when taking the Shoot Action.  
* **Hydraulic Claw.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY  
* **Omnissian Axe.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, TWO-HANDED  
* **Pteraxii Talons.** Melee, SHRAPNEL, TWO-HANDED  
* **Servo Claw.** Melee  
* **Transonic Blade.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR on Critical Hit, CRITICAL  
* **Transonic Razor.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR on Critical Hit, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, TWO-HANDED

#### Adeptus Mechanicus Equipment

* **Imperative Surge-Wafer (CONSUMABLE).** The model consuming this data-wafer gains \+2” movement speed for the duration of the battle.  
* **Omnispex.** The model’s Ranged Attacks ignore Cover.  
* **Serberys Construct.** The equipped model is mounted on a mechanical horse. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the ARTIFICIAL Keyword, and the SKIRMISHER and VEHICLE Keywords, a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, and it is equipped with Clawed Limbs, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Mechanical Steed ability.  
  * **Clawed Limbs.** Melee, \+1 DICE, CRITICAL. This weapon can be used alongside any other melee weapon when the rider takes the Fight Action, and does not suffer off-hand penalties.  
  * **Mechanical Steed.** The rider has \+1 DICE to all Dash, Climb, and Jump Success Rolls  
* **Servo-Skull.** The model has \+1 INJURY MODIFIER with all attacks.

### Adeptus Mechanicus Campaign Shop

During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.

* **Adamantine Arm (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Autocaduceus (8 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Leader Only).** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, STUN. Once during each battle, when another friendly ARTIFICIAL, MECHANICUS, or VEHICLE model within 12” that the equipped model can see suffers an Out of Action or Down result on the Injury chart, you can turn that result into a Minor Hit result instead.  
* **Cerebral Techno-Mitre (1 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** The range of all of the model’s abilities (those in its statistics) is increased by 3”.  
* **Eye Of Xi-Lexum (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** As an Action that requires no roll, the equipped model can choose one enemy it can see within 18” of it. The next model besides the equipped model that makes a ranged attack against that enemy before the end of the current Turn has \+1 INJURY MODIFIER during that attack.  
* **Kardiocore Galvanus (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Skitarii Marshal or Skitarii Only).** The equipped model has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Multiplexed Neural Inducer (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** As an Action that requires no roll, the equipped model can choose one ally it can see within 12”. The equipped model’s Activation ends and the chosen model’s Activation immediately begins.  
* **Omnissiah’s Hand (3 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** 12”. This attack can target up to 3 different enemies. It takes no hands and can be used in addition to other weapons when the wielder takes the Shoot Action, but can be used only once per battle.  
* **Solar Atomizer (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** 12”, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, IGNORE ARMOUR within 6”, ASSAULT, BLAST 2”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
* **Solar Flare (4 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** Once per battle, the equipped model can use the Solar Flare to teleport. Remove it from the table, then place it on the table anywhere that is at least 8” away from all enemies.  
* **Transinduction Body (5 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Elite Only).** The equipped model can end a Charge anywhere within close combat of the target(s). It ignores Difficult, Dangerous, and Blocking Terrain as well as enemy models when it moves during its Activation. In addition, enemy models never get free attacks against the equipped model when it Retreats, and the equipped model can move out of Melee Combat using its Standard Move, Charge, or Dash.

### Adeptus Mechanicus Elites

#### 1 Dominus (Cost: 65 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Dominus | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Dominus can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury. It can be equipped with a maximum of one Claw melee weapon.

**Abilities**

* **Lord of the Machine Cult.** As an Action with a Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the Dominus can change the current Canticle. On a success, you can choose a new Canticle, replacing the one you chose at the start of the Turn. You cannot choose either of those Canticles at the start of the next Turn.  
* **Mechadendrites.** The Dominus has an additional hand for both melee and ranged combat. Its additional melee hand can carry only a Claw weapon. It can attack with an additional weapon whenever it takes the Melee or Shoot Action, without off-hand penalties.

**Keywords**  
CONTROLLER, ELITE, LARGE, LEADER, MECHANICUS, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Skitarii Marshal (Cost: 45 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Skitarii Marshal | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Skitarii Marshal can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury, except for Claw weapons.

**Abilities**

* **Data Uplink.** As an Action with a Success Roll, the Skitarii Marshal can select one friendly model on the battlefield that is Down. On a success, that model stands up.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, MECHANICUS

#### 0-2 Tech-Priest (Cost: 60 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Tech-Priest | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Tech-Priest can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury. It can be equipped with a maximum of one Claw melee weapon.

When you recruit a Tech-Priest, you must choose one of the following Specialities:

* **Datasmith (LIMIT: 1).**   
  * **Battle Protocols.** As an Action with a Success Roll, the Datasmith can attempt to empower an allied ARTIFICIAL or VEHICLE model within 6” of it. On a success, that model gains one the following benefits during its next Activation during this Turn:  
    * \+1 flat bonus to Injure with melee attacks.  
    * \+1 flat bonus to Injure with ranged attacks.  
* **Enginseer (LIMIT: 1).**   
  * **Omnissiah’s Blessing.** As an Action with a Success Roll, the Enginseer can attempt to repair itself or a friendly MECHANICUS, ARTIFICIAL, or VEHICLE model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.  
* **Manipulus (LIMIT: 1).** The Manipulus has a base size of 50mm.  
  * **Divine Work.** The Manipulus gains the STRONG Keyword.  
  * **Galvanic Field.** Attacks made by this model or an allied MECHANICUS model within 3” of it gain ARMOUR PIERCING 1 on a Critical Hit, stacking with all other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING.  
* **Technoarchaeologist (LIMIT: 1).**   
  * **Cogitative Instincts.** Enemy models must be set up at least 16” away from the Technoarchaeologist when using the DEEP STRIKE or INFILTRATOR Keywords.  
  * **Seeker of Divine Arcana.** The Technoarchaeologist has \+1 DICE to all Success Rolls besides Dash, Melee Attack, and Ranged Attack.

**Abilities**

* **Mechadendrites.** The Tech-Priest has an additional hand for both melee and ranged combat. Its additional melee hand can carry only a Claw weapon. It can attack with an additional weapon whenever it takes the Melee or Shoot Action, without off-hand penalties.

**Keywords**  
CONTROLLER, ELITE, MECHANICUS

### Adeptus Mechanicus Troops

#### Skitarii (Cost: 40 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Skitarii | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Skitarii can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury, except for Claw weapons.

**Upgrades**

* **Pteraxii.** Up to 2 Skitarii, or 3 in a Warband of 1,200 credits or more, can be upgraded to Pteraxii for \+5 credits, allowing them to be equipped with Jump Packs (purchased separately). While equipped with a Jump Pack, a Pteraxii gains the SKIRMISHER Keyword.  
* **Ranger.** Up to 2 Skitarii, or 3 in a Warband of 1,200 credits or more, can be upgraded to Rangers for \+5 credits, granting them the INFILTRATOR Keyword.  
* **Vanguard.** Up to 2 Skitarii, or 3 in a Warband of 1,200 credits or more, can be upgraded to Vanguards for \+5 credits, granting them the following ability:  
  * **Rad-Saturation.** When an enemy model Activates while within 1” of the Vanguard, that enemy model suffers a BLOOD MARKER. An enemy with NEGATE GAS is immune.

**Keywords**  
MECHANICUS

#### 0-4 Servitor (Cost: 60 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Servitor | 5”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | \-1 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Servitor is equipped with light armour plating, included in its cost and its statistics above. It can be equipped with any single ranged weapon and any Claw melee weapons from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Expendable.** The Servitor is not counted as part of your Warband for the purposes of Morale.  
* **Mindlock.** While the Servitor is within 6” of a friendly CONTROLLER model, it has \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.  
* **Painless.** Injury rolls made against the Servitor have \-1 DICE.  
* **Property.** Servitors can be sold at any time for their full credit value between battles. Note that their weapons still only fetch half price.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, MECHANICUS, NEGATE FEAR, NO PROMOTION, STRONG

#### 0-3 Electro-Priest (Cost: 55 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Electro-Priest | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Electro-Priest can be equipped with an Electroleech Stave, Electrostatic Gauntlets, or a Taser Goad, as well as any armour or equipment from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Electro-Shock.** When this model successfully charges an enemy, that enemy suffers a STUN MARKER.  
* **Fanatical Devotion.** Injury rolls made against the Electro-Priest have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
MECHANICUS

#### 0-3 Sicarian (Cost: 65 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sicarian | 8”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sicarian can be equipped with any pistols, thrown weapons, melee weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury, except for Claw weapons.

When you recruit a Sicarian, you must choose one of the following Types:

* **Infiltrator.** The Sicarian gains the FEAR and INFILTRATOR Keywords  
* **Ruststalker.** The Sicarian gains \+1 DICE to Dash actions, and has a Chordclaw in addition to its other weapons.  
  * **Chordclaw.** Melee, takes no hands and can be used to make an extra attack when the Sicarian takes the Fight Action.

**Keywords**  
MECHANICUS, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Kataphron (Cost: 90 Credits)

You may include 0-2 Kataphron in a Warband worth 1200 credits or more.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Kataphron | 5”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | \-2 | 60mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Kataphron is equipped with armour plating, included in its statistic above. It can be equipped with any single ranged TWO-HANDED weapon and up to two Claw melee weapons from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, LARGE, MECHANICUS, NEGATE SHRAPNEL, NO PROMOTION, STRONG, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Kastelan Robot (Cost: 190 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Kastelan Robot | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+2 | \-3 | 60mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Kastelan Robot is equipped with heavy armour plating, included in its statistics above, as well as a Flamethrower, included in its cost and ignoring any limits, and its Kastelen Fist. It can be equipped with up to one other TWO-HANDED ranged weapon from the Adeptus Mechanicus Battlekit list.

* **Kastelen Fists.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY

**Abilities**

* **Kastelen Armaments.** While equipped with two ranged weapons, the Kastelen Robot can make a Shoot Action with both of them during its Activation.  
* **Repulsor Grid.** The Katelen Robot and any ally within 3” of it treat Down Injury results as Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Robotic Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Kastelan Robot is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Kastelan Robot instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Kastelan Robot.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, FEAR, LARGE, MECHANICUS, NEGATE GAS, NEGATE SHRAPNEL, NO PROMOTION, STRONG, TOUGH

### Adeptus Mechanicus Mercenaries

You can hire the following mercenaries.

#### Assassinorum Mercenaries

**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Adamus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Callidus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Culexus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Eversor Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vanus Infocyte (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Venenum Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vindicare Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Law Mercenaries

* 0-1 Arbites Enforcer (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Hardcase Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Mars Mercenaries

* 0-1 Autosavant (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Medicae Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Sydonian Skatros (Cost: 4 Glory) Non Data-Psalm Conclave Only

#### Military Mercenaries

* 0-1 Deathworld Veteran (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Penal Legionnaire (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ratling Sniper (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Space Marine Mercenaries

* 0-1 Lone Primaris Marine (Cost: 4 Glory)

**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Black Templar Crusader (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Blood Angels Sanguinary Guard (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Dark Angel Knight (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Grey Knight Paladin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Iron Hands Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Raven Guard Corvus Marine (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Space Wolves Wulfen (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 White Scars Outrider (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Other Imperial Mercenaries

* 0-1 Astropath (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Canid Companion (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Lone Inquisitor (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Navigator (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ogryn Bodyguard (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Rejuvenat Adept (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Sanctioned Psyker (Cost: 3 Glory)

### Warband Variant: Dark Mechanicum

* **Hereteks.** Your Warband counts as a Chaos Warband instead of an Imperium Warband, and you recruit mercenaries as such. Your patron must be the Heretek Lord Shared Patron.  
* **Dark Soldiers.** You can include only up to 4 Skitarii and up to 1 Sicarian, but you can include any number of Servitors in your Warband.  
* **Scyllax Horrors.** You can include up to 2 Scyllax Automata, described below, as Troops in your Warband.  
* **Daemon Engines.** Your Kataphrons and Kastelan Robots gain the DAEMON Keyword.

#### 0-2 Scyllax Automata (Cost: 125 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Scyllax Automata | 8”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Scyllax Automata is equipped with heavy armour plating and its Dismembering Mechadendrites. It can be equipped with any ranged weapons from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury.

* **Dismembering Mechadendrites.** Melee, CRITICAL  
  * Whirl: Hits all enemies in melee  
  * Dismember: \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 1

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, DAEMON, FEAR, MECHANICUS, NEGATE GAS, STEALTH

### Warband Variant: Data-Psalm Conclave

* **Cult Mechanicus.** You cannot include any Skitarii Marshals, Skitarii, Sicarians, or Kataphrons in your Warband. Your patron must be a Fabricator Locum.  
* **Priests of Mars.** You can include up to 3 Tech-Priests in your Warband.  
* **Servitor Soldiers.** You can include any number of Servitors in your Warband, but they do not have the Expendable Ability.  
* **Tech-Thralls.** You can include any number of Tech-Thralls, described Below, as Troops in your Warband.  
* **Battle Priests.** You can include up to 3 Myrmidons, described below, as Troops in your Warband.

#### Tech-Thrall (Cost: 40 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Servitor | 6”/Infantry | \-1 | \-1 | \+0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Tech-Thrall can be equipped with any single ranged weapon and any Claw melee weapons from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Mindlock.** While the Tech-Thrall is within 6” of a friendly CONTROLLER model, it has \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.  
* **Painless.** Injury rolls made against the Servitor have \-1 DICE.  
* **Property.** Servitors can be sold at any time for their full credit value between battles. Note that their weapons still only fetch half price.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, MECHANICUS, NEGATE FEAR, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-3 Myrmidon (Cost: 55 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Myrmidon | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Myrmidon can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury. It can be equipped with Power Armour, ignoring any limits.

**Abilities**

* **War Savant.** The Myrmidon ignores all penalties to its attack Success Rolls besides Cover and Long Range, as well as penalties or limits to the range of its ranged weapons.

**Keywords**  
LARGE, MECHANICUS, STRONG

### Warband Variant: Skitarii Hunter Cohort

* **Skitarii Alone.** You cannot include any Dominus, Tech-Priests, Servitors, Electro-Priests, or Kastelan Robots in your Warband. Your patron must be  Skitarii Overseer.  
* **Sicarian Princeps.** You must include at least one Sicarian in your Warband, and one of your Sicarians is a Sicarian Princeps, which costs \+20 credits, has \+2 Ranged, \+2 Melee, and the LEADER and TOUGH Keywords. It can be equipped with Power Armour  
* **Officer’s Guards.** You can include up to 2 Skitarii Huscarls, described below, as Elites in your Warband.  
* **Kataphron Heavy Support.** You can include up to 2 Kataphrons in your Warband.  
* **Skitarii Special Arms.** Add Shields to your Armoury with a cost of 10 credits each, and add the following additional battlekit to your Armoury:  
  * **Archeotech Pistol (12 credits, LIMIT: 4).** 12”, ASSAULT, CRITICAL  
  * **Arc Lance (20 credits, LIMIT: 3).** 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, STUN, TWO-HANDED, Shield Combo  
  * **Galvanic Caster (30 credits, LIMIT: 2).**   
    * Flechette: 18”, ASSAULT, SHRAPNEL  
    * Hammershot: 24”, ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
  * **Mindscrambler Grenades (15 credits, LIMIT: 1).** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 3”, STUN MARKERS, THROWN, each target hit must move D3” in the direction of its opponent’s choice.  
  * **Sulphur Breath (45 credits, LIMIT: 1, Mounted On Serberys Only).** 8”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-1 INJURY DICE, FIRE. This weapon can be used alongside any other ranged weapon when the rider takes the Shoot Action, and the rider can attack with it and still Charge, in addition to any ASSAULT weapon.  
  * **Voltlock Arquebus (10 credits).** 18”, SHOTGUN, TWO-HANDED, Bayonet Lug

#### 0-2 Skitarii Huscarl (Cost: 45 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Skitarii Huscarl | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Skitarii Huscarl can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Adeptus Mechanicus Armoury. It can be equipped with any Skitarii Only battlekit.

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Skitarii Huscarl is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Skitarii Huscarl instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Skitarii Huscarl.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, MECHANICUS
